info.title: DDDAdvisor.CLI
info.description: Command-line tool for analyzing .NET solutions against DDD best practices.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: DDDAdvisor - Your DDD mentor in the terminal

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze a .NET solution for DDD best practices

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the solution (.sln) or project (.csproj) file [default: <path>]
